scope: FQ-09C: commit the operator-approved canon/art-direction/storyboard planning docs and implement the opening cinematic before the title menu, with the authorship lock 'By Paul Peck' engine-rendered on the title card and the persistent title screen. Mid-run the operator rejected a static-panel implementation and then a plotted-but-simple pass, redirecting to a genuinely animated hybrid: code-animated puppet acting now, per-shot cel-frame hooks for hand-authored animation later.
summary: Eight-scene ~42s 'Coheronia DOS Vector Cinematic' with a puppet acting layer, authored 640x360 on a SubViewport and integer-scaled 2x nearest into the 1280x720 viewport. A deterministic 10 Hz tick drives a pure (scene, tick) -> draw-command renderer (scripts/shell/prologue_canvas.gd): plotted contours, segmented road dissolves, a detaching river, palette-cycled fire and torches, two-frame eyes, stepped storms and lightning, ordered hall assembly with a white ridge-lock flash, a quantized attunement wavefront, parallax settlement layers, and integer-zoom camera cuts. Articulated keyframed puppets (scripts/shell/prologue_puppets.gd; 5-degree angle quantization, pixel snapping, tool props, ancestry-by-proportion) act every scene: the five peoples walk in and behave around the fire (with a hard punch-in cut), a watch freezes toward the cave eyes, two builders hammer on staggered loops while the orc raises the roof beam (opening tight on the foundation), the founder kneels and sources the pulse from a hand on the ground, and a digger/carrier/tender work the settlement. The controller (scripts/shell/prologue.gd) owns the SCENES narrative table (exact copy, 42.0s), stepped text reveals in a stable band, input (one key/click = one scene; Escape skips and stops clock+audio; no click-through), placeholder-safe audio cues, a debug review mode, clean-profile autoplay, title-menu replay, and the idempotent profile-only prologue_seen flag. Cel-shot hook: a scene id resolving an FQ-09V frame pool under art/generated/opening/ plays authored frames at 8 fps in place of the plotted shot, falling back cleanly on removal - the upgrade path to hand-drawn animation one shot at a time. Suite 190 -> 203 (13 fq09c_* checks); haiku verifier NO FINDINGS; manual GUI passes verified autoplay/replay/advance/skip with real input and screenshots.
acceptance: Exact scene order/copy/timing match docs/OPENING_STORYBOARD.md, walked live scene by scene (fq09c_panel_order_and_exact_copy; 42.0s data-driven, fq09c_scene_timing_and_cues_data_driven)

Every scene genuinely animates beyond fading and replots deterministically: per-scene command fingerprints differ across ticks and repeat identically for identical (scene, tick) (fq09c_every_scene_genuinely_animated, fq09c_rendering_deterministic) on the locked 640x360/10 Hz surface (fq09c_pixel_surface_640x360)

COHERONIA / By Paul Peck / Where civilization pushes back. are engine labels on the title card and the persistent title screen with the Prologue replay button beside intact Play/Continue/Quit (fq09c_title_card_authorship, fq09c_title_screen_authorship_and_replay)
Completion emits finished(true) exactly once with no double-advance; skip finishes mid-sequence with processing stopped and audio silent (fq09c_completion_emits_once, fq09c_skip_finishes_safely)
prologue_seen is profile-level, persists a shell reload, is idempotent on replay, and replay touches no characters or worlds (fq09c_seen_flag_profile_roundtrip, fq09c_replay_isolated)
COHERONIA_SMOKE=1 bypass proven by the run itself (fq09c_smoke_bypasses_prologue); COHERONIA_SHOTS keeps its pre-prologue title tour
Cel-shot hook plays a registered frame pool and falls back on removal, self-cleaning temp art (fq09c_cel_shot_hook)

Manual waited-GUI passes: clean-profile autoplay to completion wrote the flag with the process alive at the title (twice); menu-click replay; one real keypress advanced exactly one scene; one real Escape returned to the attributed title; operator profile restored
validation: python scripts/validate_repo.py -> PASS incl. prologue.gd/prologue_canvas.gd/prologue_puppets.gd required, opening_NN_ ids in storyboard and runtime, exact title lines in the runtime
COHERONIA_SMOKE=1 waited windowed run -> 203/203 PASS at 2026-07-10T06:50:51
haiku read-only diff verifier -> NO FINDINGS
decisions: Authored resolution 640x360 at exact 2x nearest into the 16:9 1280x720 viewport (canon production rule); text renders outside the pixel surface with the game font for stability/localizability
Rendering is a pure function of (scene, tick) executing a flat command list - animation can never depend on wall-clock timing, and tests fingerprint drawn state instead of screenshots

Acting is quantized keyframe puppetry (5-degree angle steps, pixel snapping), deliberately stepped rather than tweened - the honest code-only ceiling; true cel quality arrives per shot via the cel hook, not by faking it procedurally
Camera cuts are an integer-zoom transform over the command list, so close-ups keep the same hard pixel grammar (pixels become zoom-sized blocks, line widths scale)

The cel hook reuses FQ-09V variant pools verbatim (convention or explicit array) - zero new loader code, validator rules already enforce path existence; capped at 8 frames/scene by MAX_VARIANTS until deliberately raised
prologue_seen is written only by completion or skip via an idempotent GameState helper; replay can never rewrite or clear it, and the smoke check restores the operator's prior value
Two rejected iterations (static panels; plotted-only scenes) remain in history as deaedac's lineage - evidence over erasure

Swarm: 3 haiku read-only scouts (shell seams, smoke/validator conventions, canon consistency), one implementation lead owning all edits, 1 haiku read-only diff verifier; one verifier attempt lost to a subagent session limit and re-run
risks: No audio ships; cue ids are placeholders wired to res://audio/opening/<id>.ogg with silent fallback - future assets must follow the restrained storyboard direction
Scene composition assumes the lower-quarter text band: keep meaningful action above canvas y~272
Puppet/scene geometry is hand-plotted code - adjust in prologue_canvas.gd/prologue_puppets.gd, never via baked images; blocky heads at zoom 2 are a style choice
Cel-shot pools cap at 8 frames (FQ-09V MAX_VARIANTS); raising it is a deliberate constant change
DotT-grade cel animation remains art-gated: FQ-09A prompt packs should produce the opening's frame sheets, replacing shots one at a time over the permanent plotted fallback
next_action: FQ-09W: scene backdrops, underground darkness, and backing-wall foundation.
